---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a code change for review
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph explanation of what this PR does and why. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number if applicable -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark with `x` all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style or refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test addition or correction
- [ ] 🔧 CI / build / infrastructure

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and the output. If no tests cover this change,
     explain why tests aren't needed. -->

- [ ] Unit tests (`make test`)
- [ ] Manual verification (describe steps)

## Checklist

<!-- Mark with `x` all that apply. -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have checked for potential side effects on other modules

## Screenshots / Logs

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your change. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other information that would help reviewers understand the change. -->
